potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall allow customers to search for products.
The system shall allow customers to complete payments for their orders.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: After finding something they like, they can add it to their wishlist and then move it to the cart.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow customers to add products from search results directly to the shopping cart.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall enable customers to track their orders after placement.
hallucinations.reason: The source text mentions tracking an order, but it does not specify that this should happen 'after placement'. It could be tracked at other stages as well.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow customers to provide or update delivery details for items in the cart.
ambiguities.reason: It is ambiguous whether this requirement applies to all items in the cart or just one item. The source text does not specify.
